tables.name: entries
tables.label: Entries
tables.description: The universal node — a project, task, comment, note, or embedded tool (wireframe / sheet / doc / sketch), nested to any depth via parentId. Every entry has a title and a comment; its type decides its content; any entry can hold child entries.

tables.name: users
tables.label: People
tables.description: The people on this board. Defined here, addable any time; an entry's 'created by' and 'prompting' chips point at them.
